@graph.name: Hex.pm API
@graph.description: REST API for the Hex.pm package registry for the Erlang and Elixir ecosystems.

@graph.rdfs:label: Package
@graph.rdfs:comment: A software library or application published to the Hex.pm registry.

html_url.rdfs:comment: URL to the package page on hex.pm.

@graph.rdfs:label: Release
@graph.rdfs:comment: A versioned release of a Hex.pm package.

checksum.rdfs:comment: SHA-256 checksum of the release tarball.

has_docs.rdfs:comment: Whether documentation is published for this release.

@graph.rdfs:label: Organization
@graph.rdfs:comment: A Hex.pm organization that can own private packages and manage members.

@graph.rdfs:label: ApiKey
@graph.rdfs:comment: An authentication credential for accessing the Hex.pm API.

name.rdfs:comment: Human-readable name for the API key.

permissions.rdfs:comment: List of domain/resource permissions granted to this key.

@graph.rdfs:label: Repository
@graph.rdfs:comment: A Hex package repository. The primary public repository is hex.pm.
